entity.summary: MEER-chain Uniswap V2-style automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with substantial historical trading volume but zero current TVL in the reviewed registry snapshot.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies CandySwap as a MEER-chain Uniswap V2 fork with substantial cumulative DEX volume but zero current TVL. The first-party website timed out during this review pass, so HEI uses inactive rather than dead and marks the URL live_unverified.

evidence.title: CandySwap official website
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party CandySwap domain is preserved, but the site timed out during this review pass, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: CandySwap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies CandySwap as a MEER-chain Uniswap V2 fork, reports zero current TVL, and preserves substantial cumulative DEX volume, supporting inactive classification.

evidence.title: CandySwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies CandySwap as a decentralized exchange on the MEER ecosystem.
